headline: PPG Industries Highlights Aerospace Strength Through Innovation
summary: PPG spotlights aerospace innovation, 3D-printed sealants, seal caps and a chrome-free primer, pitching growth via investment and capacity expansion.

raw.headline: PPG Industries Highlights Aerospace Strength Through Innovation

headline: DOW Partners With Xylem to Advance Path2Zero Project
summary: Dow teams up with Xylem on Fort Saskatchewan water systems, aiming to cut freshwater demand and boost efficiency by 2028.

raw.headline: DOW Partners With Xylem to Advance Path2Zero Project
raw.summary: Dow teams up with Xylem on Fort Saskatchewan water systems, aiming to cut freshwater demand and boost efficiency by 2028.

headline: Uranium Energy Earnings Miss Estimates in Q3 on Higher Spending
summary: UEC misses Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings estimates as operating costs surge, reflecting spending on mine development and broader U.S. fuel-cycle plans.

raw.headline: Uranium Energy Earnings Miss Estimates in Q3 on Higher Spending
raw.summary: UEC misses Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings estimates as operating costs surge, reflecting spending on mine development and broader U.S. fuel-cycle plans.

headline: BASFY Closes Expandable Polystyrene Assets in South Korea's Ulsan
summary: BASF will end EPS production at South Korea's Ulsan Plastics site by mid-June 2026 as it reviews its styrenics network and competitiveness.

raw.headline: BASFY Closes Expandable Polystyrene Assets in South Korea's Ulsan
raw.summary: BASF will end EPS production at South Korea's Ulsan Plastics site by mid-June 2026 as it reviews its styrenics network and competitiveness.

headline: Vertical Research Turns Bullish on Albemarle (ALB); RBC Reiterates Outperform Rating
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy According to D. E. Shaw. On May 26, Vertical Research upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Hold. It assigned a $224 price target to the stock. The same day, RBC Capital raised its price recommendation on Albemarle to $257 from $253. […]
